control_card.C: Pure Python stdlib; deterministic fixed toy rows; JSON, CSV, Markdown; no docs, tests, or Agda edits.
control_card.F: Missing required rows, absent centered/adverse classes, any proof claim, missing constants closure, barrier closure, or Clay promotion fails closed.
control_card.G: Require has_centered_support=true, has_adverse_scenarios=true, all proof/promotion flags false, artifact_complete=true, and invariants_passed=true.
control_card.L: toy profile parameters -> v crossing geometry -> source sign hazard -> theorem requirement -> fail-closed summary flags.
control_card.O: Sprint 143 lane 3 emits only the off-center crossing scenario classifier script and its generated output artifacts.
control_card.P: Do not promote: no secondary-peak exclusion, no global barrier closure, and no Clay Navier-Stokes solution.
control_card.R: Classify toy v=partial_z u1 crossing geometries: centered monotone support plus off-center, boundary-layer, annular, and delayed admissible scenarios.
control_card.S: Centered monotone branch is supported locally, but all adverse scenario classes remain admissible unless a theorem is supplied.
